flashcards.definition: Abandoned or underused industrial/commercial site with real or suspected contamination.
US law (1980) establishing a program to clean up the nation's worst hazardous waste sites.
Using living organisms (bacteria, fungi, plants) to break down or absorb soil and water contaminants.
Using plants to absorb, accumulate, or break down contaminants in soil or water.
Decline in land productivity due to erosion, contamination, salinization, or desertification.
